Exit load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
Stamp duty: Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

sections.text:
Minimum investments:
Min. for 1st investment: ₹100
Min. for 2nd investment: ₹100
Min. for SIP: ₹100
Fund benchmark: Domestic Price of Gold
Tax implication: If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.

fields.tax_implication: If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.text:
Fund management:
Manager 1: Arun Agarwal
Tenure: Feb 2023
Education: Mr. Agarwal is a B.Com. and Chartered Accountant
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC Asset Management Company Limited, he has worked with SBI Funds Management Pvt. Ltd., ICICI Bank Limited, UTI Asset Management Pvt. Ltd.
Manager 2: Nandita Menezes
Tenure: Mar 2025
Education: CA (ICAI, INDIA), B.Com (University of Mumbai)
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC, she was associated with S.V. Ghatalia & Associates LLP.
Also manages: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth; HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund Direct Growth; HDFC NIFTY 50 Index Fund Direct Growth; HDFC BSE Sensex Index Fund Direct Growth; HDFC Equity Savings Direct Plan Growth
(+34 more schemes)
